title: Verify existing implementation of clamp utility
description: The clamp utility already exists at src/utils/clamp.ts with 8 passing tests covering: value within range, below min, above max, edge cases at min/max boundaries, negative numbers, floating point numbers, and throws on invalid min/max. No math-helpers.ts file was created as specified in task - the implementation is in clamp.ts.
existing_patterns: src/utils/clamp.ts implements a pure utility function with parameter validation
src/utils/clamp.test.ts follows standard vitest pattern with describe/it structure
